title: Design and implement usage-based billing engine
description: Migrate from flat monthly pricing ($49/$99/$199 tiers) to consumption-based pricing where customers pay per metric ingested and per dashboard query. Requires a metering pipeline that tracks usage in real time, a rating engine to apply pricing rules, and integration with Stripe for invoicing.

title: Build pricing calculator and cost estimator for customers
description: Customers migrating to usage-based pricing need transparency on expected costs. Build an in-app pricing calculator that estimates monthly costs based on current usage patterns, and a predictive cost dashboard showing projected spend for the next billing cycle.

title: Implement usage alerts and spending caps
description: To prevent bill shock during pricing transition, customers need configurable spending alerts (50%, 75%, 90%, 100% of budget) and optional hard spending caps that pause non-critical data ingestion when exceeded. Must handle graceful degradation without data loss.

title: Grandfather existing customers with 12-month price lock
description: Product and legal agreed to honor current pricing for existing customers for 12 months after the switch. Need a grandfathering system that tracks customer cohorts, applies correct pricing tiers, and automatically transitions customers after the lock period with 60-day advance notice.

title: Customer churn risk analysis for pricing migration
description: Finance and product need a model that identifies which customer segments will see cost increases vs. decreases under the new pricing. Flag accounts where projected spend increases >30% for proactive account management outreach. CEOs concern is losing mid-market accounts during transition.
